title: Pap (Mealie Meal)
blurb: South Africa's daily bread — maize meal porridge, from crumbly phutu to smooth slap pap, the base of every meal.

title: Potbrood
blurb: South Africa's fireside bread — a soft, golden loaf baked in a lidded cast-iron pot for a crackling crust and pillowy crumb.
method: Fire or oven · bake in a potjie
ings: 30 gbutter, melted, plus extra for greasing

title: Roosterkoek
blurb: Braai bread at its best — yeasted dough balls cooked over hot coals, crisp outside and pillowy soft within.
